mapper.sql: SELECT w.widget_id AS id, w.user_id AS userId, w.widget_name AS name, w.data_json AS data, w.category_name AS categoryName, u.user_name AS userName, w.create_time AS createTime, w.update_time AS updateTime FROM dashboard_widget w LEFT JOIN dashboard_user u ON u.user_id = w.user_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO dashboard_widget (user_id, widget_name, data_json, category_name) VALUES (#{userId}, #{name}, #{data}, #{categoryName})
mapper.update: UPDATE dashboard_widget SET widget_name = #{name}, data_json = #{data}, category_name = #{categoryName}, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE widget_id = #{id}
